coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 6:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 6:00. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 6:00 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Slow down. Yes, slower. 90-110 rpm, Seated. Your aerobic system is thanking you.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 39 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 6 minutes of base work done. This feels easy — that's exactly the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 12% done. 39 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 70%, 90-110 rpm, Seated. Base miles. The work no one sees but everyone needs.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 22% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 22% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 22% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 5:00 at 70%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 22% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.MIXED: 32% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 42% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.
